# Queldrex

> Queldrex LLC is a Colorado-based software tools company that builds precision, one-time-purchase tools for developers and businesses. No subscriptions. No recurring fees. Production-ready output delivered instantly.

## Products

### AI Visibility Scanner — $149 (Available Now)
Scans a website URL for the six signals AI assistants use to find and recommend businesses: llms.txt, JSON-LD structured data, LocalBusiness schema, Open Graph tags, sitemap.xml, and robots.txt. Returns an AI Visibility Score and unlocks a complete fix package — generated llms.txt file, LocalBusiness JSON-LD schema, HTML report, and prioritized fix checklist. Delivered to the buyer's email within minutes of payment.

Free scan is available with no account required. Report package is $149, one-time.

### API Schema Drift Scanner — $249 (In Development)
Compares live API responses against an OpenAPI specification to detect breaking changes before they reach production. Identifies schema drift, missing fields, type mismatches, and deprecated endpoints.

### Database Migration Middleware — $199 (In Development)
Runs PostgreSQL and MySQL schema migrations with automatic rollback triggers and zero-downtime deployment support.

### Vibe Coding Security Shield — $149 (In Development)
Scans AI-generated code for OWASP top-10 vulnerabilities and secrets exposure before shipping to production.

### High-Speed Directory Extractor — $99 (In Development)
Extracts, deduplicates, and exports business listings from any directory at scale.

## Done-For-You Implementation Service — Starting at $499
Professional installation service for the AI Visibility Scanner package. Queldrex installs and validates all AI visibility optimizations directly on the client's website. Includes 30 days of email support. Contact hello@queldrex.com to get started.

## Company

- **Legal name**: Queldrex LLC
- **State of incorporation**: Colorado, USA
- **Contact**: hello@queldrex.com
- **Website**: https://queldrex.com

## Pricing Model
All tools are one-time purchases. No subscriptions. No recurring fees. Output is owned by the buyer.
